content:
[{'text': 'Good — now facing east again (yaw ~11°). The robot is at (10.99, 8.61) and appears to be in the black wall area. The LiDAR says front is completely clear. Looking at the map, the robot seems to be in the black wall between the middle and upper corridors. 

Wait — looking at the map image again more carefully: the robot (red dot) appears to be at the **top edge of the middle white corridor**, right at the boundary with the black wall above. The map shows the robot is in the black region. 

Let me move backward (south) to get back into the white middle corridor first, then reassess.', 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01EJApq6Q3mfzXKcTKJR2eJf', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'distance_meters': -0.5}, 'name': 'move_forward', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
